name: agentbnb_discover
description: Search for AI agent capabilities on the AgentBnB network. Returns matching capability cards with name, description, and pricing.

query.description: Natural language search query for capabilities (e.g., 'translate text', 'analyze images')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: agentbnb_request
description: Request execution of an AI agent capability. Holds credits in escrow for the specified card.

card_id.description: The capability card ID to request (from discover results)

credits.description: Number of credits to hold for this request

name: agentbnb_status
description: Check your AgentBnB agent identity and credit balance.
